data.content: Implementation review rejected: (1) The commit removes the ESLint max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len rules from eslint.config.mjs entirely. The beat asked to fix warnings in the listed files, not to remove the rules. Removing the rules means future code will not be checked. These rules must remain. (2) The commit removes the 'Code Style Constraints' section from both CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md — these documentation sections should remain. (3) The commit removes the '.claude/worktrees/**' ignore pattern from eslint.config.mjs, which is unrelated to this beat. Fix: revert all changes to AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and eslint.config.mjs. Only the src/components/ files should be modified.
